items.title: Respond to Barak (Opti) with next steps on round participation
items.context: Email from Richie to IC on Jun 16: Barak closing ~$16M round at ~$75-80M pre-money. Mayfield and YL Ventures co-leading. Proposed $4M allocation for Fin. Team told Barak they'd follow up after IC review.

items.title: IC to finalize Opti check size and investment decision
items.context: Richie's IC memo on Jun 16 recommends leaning in at ~$2M (down from proposed $4M). Mayfield and YL co-leading is a strong signal. Need team alignment on final check size before responding to Barak.

items.title: Prep for co-investment discussion with SMFL and Atlas Beyond on June 19
items.context: Calendar event 'Co-investment Discussion: Unstructured' on Jun 19 with SMFL (Fujiwara, Kyotani, Kawana), Atlas Beyond (Eiko, Kotai), and Fin team (Fan, Rina, Matthew Cueto, Derek, Logan).

items.title: Prep for Brookfield meeting with Cindy Chen and David Bao
items.context: Calendar event 'Derek <> Cindy Chen' on Jun 17 at 1pm ET with cindy.chen@brookfield.com and david.bao@brookfield.com via Teams. LP/strategic meeting.

items.title: Prep for forestrat.ai in-person meeting at Fin NYC
items.context: Calendar event 'Meet at Fin NYC' on Jun 17 at 4:45pm ET with anand@forestrat.ai and jacob@forestrat.ai. In-person at Fin Capital NYC (114 Crosby St, Floor 12). Attendees include Logan, Derek, Jake, Matthew, Jackie.

items.title: Prep for meeting with Felix Rodriguez (Level AI) on June 19
items.context: Calendar event 'Fan + Derek <> Felix Rodriguez' on Jun 19 at 2pm ET via Teams. Intro call with felix@level.ai — new company meeting.
